      Car-Rental special services amount.

      Car-Rental Insurance Amount.

      Amount per mile.

      Name of the renter or name from the driver license.

      City where rental period started.
      java.lang.String PickupCountryCode
      Country where rental period started.

      Start of rental period timestamp.

      The name or ID of the location where the vehicle was picked up.
      java.lang.String PickupState
      State where rental period started.

      Rental period in days.

      Program type for this transaction:
      java.lang.String ReturnCity
      City where the rental car is returned.

      Country where the rental car is returned.
      java.lang.String ReturnDatetime
      Date and time when the rental car should be returned.
      java.lang.String ReturnLocation
      The name or ID of the location to where the car is returned.
      java.lang.String ReturnState
      State where the rental car was returned.
      java.lang.String TotalMiles
      Rental car total odometer reading at the time of return.

      Vehicle Class ID.

        Car-Rental Agreement/Invoice Number issued by the rental agency.

        Attribute: ans...25

        Total rental rate amount per day.
        Format $$$$$$CC.

        Attribute: n...8

        Rental period in days.

        Attribute: n...4

      • InsuranceAmount

        public java.lang.String InsuranceAmount
        Car-Rental Insurance Amount.
        Format $$$$$$CC.

        Attribute: n...8

      • AllocatedMiles

        public java.lang.String AllocatedMiles
        Maximum miles allocated for rental without charge.
        Total mileage for rental period.

        Attribute: n...8

      • MileRate

        public java.lang.String MileRate
        Amount per mile. Format $$$$$$CC

        Attribute: n...8

      • Name

        public java.lang.String Name
        Name of the renter or name from the driver license.

        Attribute: ans...20

      • DriverLicenseNumber

        public java.lang.String DriverLicenseNumber
        The number on the driver license.

        Attribute: ans...20

      • RentalProgramType

        public java.lang.String RentalProgramType
        Program type for this transaction:

        1 - Advance Deposit
        2 - Assured Reservation
        3 - Delayed charge
        4 - Express Service
        5 - Normal Charge
        6 - No Show Charge

        Attribute: n1

      • PickupLocationName

        public java.lang.String PickupLocationName
        The name or ID of the location where the vehicle was picked up.

        Attribute: ans...40

        public java.lang.String PickupCity
        City where rental period started.

        Attribute: ans...25

        State where rental period started.

        Country where rental period started.

        public java.lang.String PickupDatetime
        Start of rental period timestamp. Format YYYYMMDDhhmmss.

        Attribute: n...14

      • ReturnLocation

        public java.lang.String ReturnLocation
        The name or ID of the location to where the car is returned.

        Attribute: ans...40

      • ReturnCity

        public java.lang.String ReturnCity
        City where the rental car is returned.

        Attribute: ans...25

        public java.lang.String ReturnState
        State where the rental car was returned.

        Country where the rental car is returned.

      • ReturnDatetime

        public java.lang.String ReturnDatetime
        Date and time when the rental car should be returned. Format YYYYMMDDhhmmss.

        Attribute: n...14

        public java.lang.String TotalMiles
        Rental car total odometer reading at the time of return.

        Attribute: n...8
